title: NEO Governor Checkpoint
description: Resumability-first state, written continuously by NEO_GOVERNOR. A hard stop at any moment must resume cleanly from this. Includes a changed-files baseline so resume can detect a stale checkpoint before continuing.

progress.description: Plain status of where the current task stands.

next_step.description: The single next action to take on resume.

is_estimate.description: TRUE on the subscription path (own-counter estimate). On the API path this reflects provider-reported spend where available.

changed_files_baseline.description: STALE-CHECKPOINT GUARD: {path, sha256} of files this session changed at checkpoint time. On resume, re-hash and compare before continuing.

updated_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp (caller-supplied; agents do not self-generate time).
